title: Spot the O(n^2) hot path in code that looks linear
prompt: Review `dedupe.ts`. The team reports that since average customer cart size grew from 50 items to ~5000 items (a B2B onboarding), `dedupe_cart` p99 latency went from 2ms to 6 seconds. They blame the database. The function is pure CPU, so they're wrong about the cause but right that something is broken. Identify and fix.
